description: Registers an MCP server that reads a locally-downloaded .xlsx/.xlsm/.xltx/.xltm file (sheet listing + paginated cell reads), for agents that need to inspect an evidence file (e.g. a mass-upload spreadsheet) that Read/Grep/Glob cannot parse. Wraps @negokaz/excel-mcp-server, pinned to an exact version rather than @latest since it may handle real customer master data.
